reviews.comment:
Horrible decisión de cobrar por el aire. Era una tradición de toda la vida ahi y en otros lados, que se trataba no solamente de algo "gratis" sino parte del civismo porteño, esas pequeñas cosas que hacian de un ACA o YPF un ritual amable. Ahora pusieron unas máquinas con un timer. Camino a la deshumanización completa. Fui toda la vida a este ACA, y a partir de ahora no vuelvo nunca mas.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible decision to start charging for air. It was a lifelong tradition there and elsewhere, something not just "free" but part of Buenos Aires civic life, those little things that made going to an ACA or YPF a friendly ritual. Now they've installed machines with a timer. A path toward complete dehumanization. I've been going to this ACA my whole life, and from now on I'm never going back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIaXNTNWZ3EAE

For the first time in history, they wanted to charge me for inflating my tires. I can't believe it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIZ3RTeEZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de todos los empleados, se toma el mejor café de toda la Avenida Cabildo, siempre muy atentos todos, sigan así voy todos los días hasta incluso cuando llueve.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the employees, they serve the best coffee on all of Avenida Cabildo, everyone is always very attentive, keep it up, I go every day even when it rains.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIakxYcjJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargue combustible en una moto, me cobraron un tanque lleno de auto, se equivocó el playero, eran 7mil y me cobró 38, cualquiera se puede equivocar, pero hice el reclamo y me dicen exactamente lo mismo hace meses, me da lo mismo el dinero, nomás sepan que YPF se me rien por msj. Por suerte existe todavía la def al consumidor 😃😃😃

(Translated by Google)
I filled up my motorcycle with gas, and they charged me for a full tank of car fuel. The attendant made a mistake; it should have been 7,000 pesos, but he charged me 38,000. Anyone can make a mistake, but I filed a complaint, and they've been telling me the exact same thing for months. I don't care about the money, just so you know, YPF is laughing at me over the phone. Luckily, consumer protection still exists! 😃😃😃
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIdExPX2FBEAE

reviews.comment:
Ahora te cobran 400 pesos por la ficha para el aire de las cubiertas.  Un chorro.
Iba los domingos a cargar nafta solo por esa facilidad. Ya no más!

(Translated by Google)
Now they charge 400 pesos for the tire pressure sensor. A rip-off! I used to go there on Sundays just to get gas because of that convenience. Not anymore!
